atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an ulcer on his right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ulcer has been present for approximately six to eight weeks and is not resolving.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The ulcer developed after stepping on a nail in his backyard approximately six to eight weeks ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports blood sugars running slightly higher than normal recently.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional numbness and tingling in his feet.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness and tingling in his feet, particularly in colder weather.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of smoking, having smoked at least two packs per day for twenty plus years.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports quitting smoking approximately four years ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional headaches.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports headaches, often described as tension headaches in the front of his head.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies fever or chills.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling fatigued for the past two months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals a two by three centimeter ulcerated lesion on the right lateral foot near the fifth metatarsal-metatarsophalangeal joint, with associated granulation tissue and slight purulent discharge.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs are unremarkable: blood pressure is 127/78 mmHg, heart rate is 62 bpm, and temperature is normal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A two out of six systolic ejection murmur is auscultated at the left base.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis and posterior tibial pulses are palpable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No jugular venous distension or carotid bruits are appreciated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an arterial ultrasound of the lower extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a podiatry consult.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician continues the patient on aspirin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up with the primary care physician.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has diabetes management to discuss.
